description_long: This kiosk features a modular, L-shaped structure with a prominent blue panel wall and a wood-textured floor. The main wall displays a large, high-resolution landscape graphic of a hiker overlooking a turquoise lake, creating an inviting and visually engaging backdrop. The shorter side wall and a freestanding counter both display the SEGO Modular Lightbox branding in bold white text on blue backgrounds. The kiosk is open on two sides, allowing easy access for visitors, and is designed for use in exhibition or promotional settings. The construction appears to use lightweight metal framing, rigid panels, and printed fabric or vinyl graphics. The overall design is sleek, modern, and functional, with no visible windows or doors.
description: A modern, L-shaped exhibition kiosk with blue branding panels, a wood-textured floor, and a large scenic graphic backdrop. Features a branded counter and open access on two sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the scenic landscape graphic, branded counter, and open access area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the blue side panel with SEGO branding and the depth of the kiosk.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full expanse of the blue panel wall with large SEGO Modular Lightbox text.
description_view_3: End view focusing on the short blue wall and the counter's position relative to the kiosk.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign and logo, placed on the front counter, side panel, and rear wall; visible text: 'SEGO MODULAR LIGHTBOX'.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roofless design, open to above, with no overhangs or decorative elements.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern minimalist with modular exhibition influences.
